effect.reserved_for: one style per screen/section — never two of the same style competing
effect.subject: callout_style

quotes: never two of the same style competing on one screen/section

three approved styles — use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section

governance_note: discretionary use of styles implied by 'use judiciously'; prohibition applies only to two instances of the same style competing within one screen/section
intent: Prevent visual repetition and preserve callout hierarchy.
rule_text: There are three approved callout styles; use them judiciously and never place two of the same style competing on one screen/section.
